programs.programName: State Long Term Care Ombudsman Program

verified.notes: The Mississippi State Long-Term Care Ombudsman Program is an advocacy and complaint resolution service for residents in long-term care facilities. It does not have eligibility criteria based on age, income, or assets—services are available to all residents in covered facilities and are free and confidential. The phone number provided is the statewide Long-Term Care Ombudsman Help Line from the official MDHS website.
